infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: MindJournal AI uses speech recognition to turn a Quick Entry into a private journal note.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MindJournal AI uses your microphone only while you create a Quick Entry.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow MindJournal AI to use the microphone for Quick Entries.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow MindJournal AI to turn Quick Entries into text.
